overall_assessment.summary: BREAKTHROUGH: First real click achieved on /tools/investment-25k-10yr (investment tool variant, pos 12.7, 33.3% CTR). This breaks the 28-day 0-click drought. However, it's a thin tool variant — the core pages ($20k loan blog at pos 10.1, retirement decision at pos 4.8) still have 0 clicks. Position improvement continues (25.7, +9.8pts from Jun 19 low of 35.5). The #1 obstacle remains recrawl lag: key pages haven't been crawled in 18-25 days, making deployed fixes invisible. New discovery: /decision/how-much-do-i-need-to-retire at position 4.8 is the site's best-positioned page and a stronger first-click candidate than 2 of the 3 approved breakthrough pages.
overall_assessment.next_natural_step: Wait for Google natural recrawl of $20k loan blog. Consider adding /decision/how-much-do-i-need-to-retire to the breakthrough page list — it has 6x the impressions and a better position (4.8 vs 7.5/5.7) than pages 2/3. No action possible under Phase 31 freeze.
